settings.label: Brand story (intro paragraph)
settings.default: Playmate Labs was founded on a simple observation: most of us are too busy, too distracted, and too comfortable to create truly memorable moments with our partners.

settings.label: Value 1 description
settings.default: Every product is designed with a specific ritual in mind — not just aesthetically pleasing, but experientially purposeful.

settings.label: Value 2 description
settings.default: We work with all five senses to create moments that are truly felt, not just experienced.

settings.label: Value 3 description
settings.default: Eco packaging, ethically sourced ingredients, carbon-neutral shipping.
